keyPoints: Provides a dedicated API Gateway & Governance platform engineered to a hybrid deployment model that places the API runtime gateway on-premises or in a customer's private Kubernetes clusters..
Integrates Apigee Hybrid capabilities directly into multi-tier cloud architectures, serving as a key component of the DevOps Continuous Integration and Application Delivery portfolio.
Encourages standard interface structures (REST APIs, Client SDKs, or console controls) to facilitate rapid cloud resource provisioning.
Automates software builds, containerization, and deployments using declaration files (YAML/JSON).
Supports release automation with built-in progressive rollout strategies (canary, blue-green, and rolling upgrades).
Secures the software supply chain by scanning dependencies, code, and container images for known vulnerabilities.
Optimizes Apigee Hybrid performance through automated platform scaling and resource balancing.
Enables resource segregation, logical naming conventions, and tag-based configuration policies for Apigee Hybrid.
Integrates with VPC routing and private service access architectures to secure communication tunnels.
Governs access to Apigee Hybrid using standard IAM roles (e.g. roles/geehybrid.admin and roles/geehybrid.viewer) for fine-grained permissions.
Supports audit logging to record administrative actions and verify API configuration modifications for compliance reports.
Secures operational payloads using encryption at rest (Google-managed or Customer-Managed Keys via KMS) and SSL/TLS in transit.
Offers regional and multi-regional configuration options, duplicating service state across multiple zones to sustain outage events.
Enforces API quotas and rate limits programmatically to prevent resource starvation and noisy-neighbor interference.
Provides service recovery tools, regular status logs, and high-availability SLAs matching enterprise uptime goals.
Billed based on resource metrics (e.g., operations count, active connections, or gigabytes stored) allowing cost optimization.
Integrates with Cloud Monitoring and Cloud Logging to enable real-time alerting, metrics tracking, and diagnostic dashboards.
Enables command line administration through the gcloud CLI tool, allowing pipeline automation and scripting.

scenarios.scenario: An enterprise wants to construct a secure architectural pattern involving Apigee Hybrid that blocks public internet ingress and enforces strict access restrictions.
scenarios.solution: Deploy the Apigee Hybrid resource inside a VPC Service Control perimeter, routing connections privately using Serverless VPC connectors or internal gateways, and assign permissions using IAM roles.

scenarios.scenario: A development team needs to build automated CI/CD configurations that configure and audit Apigee Hybrid operations on a regular basis while tracking costs.
scenarios.solution: Use Cloud Build scripts executing 'gcloud' commands to provision the Apigee Hybrid resources, enable Cloud Audit Logs, and configure budget notifications at the project folder level.

commands.description: Create or configure a new Apigee Hybrid resource
commands.command:
gcloud apigee create prod-geehybrid-resource \
  --region=us-central1 \
  --description="Production Apigee Hybrid Resource"

commands.description: List active Apigee Hybrid instances and query configuration states
